edges.evidence_quote: The National Gang Intelligence Center has noted a high number of Juggalo sets with ties to the Los Angeles-based Bloods gang
edges.context: Juggalo sets often align with Bloods, sharing color red and collaborating in drive-by shootings.

edges.evidence_quote: In Pennsylvania, the Bloods and Crips dominate the incarcerated Juggalo gangs and use them for recruitment.
edges.context: Crips dominate incarcerated Juggalo gangs and use them for recruitment.

edges.evidence_quote: Juggalos in Rose Hill, Fairfax County, Virginia have been linked to the Gangster Disciples.
edges.context: Juggalos in Rose Hill are linked to Gangster Disciples.
